primary_source: Guarnera et al. (2023); Liu et al. (2025)
notes: High benchmark accuracy on GAN benchmarks; structurally fails on diffusion content due to architectural mismatch — diffusion produces different artifact signatures than GAN adversarial training. Trivially bypassed by post-processing.

primary_source: Khan et al. (2025); Singh et al. (2025)
notes: Analyzes blink rate, micro-expressions, pulse. More architecture-agnostic than artifact methods. Degrades when high-fps training data allows generative models to simulate biological patterns convincingly.
Detects spectral anomalies in synthetic speech. Gap narrowing as VITS and VALL-E voice cloning architectures improve formant and pitch simulation. Particularly weak on clips under 3 seconds.
Effective only when metadata intact. Trivially bypassed by stripping (zero attacker cost). C2PA aims to address via cryptographic provenance but adoption remains limited.
State-of-the-art benchmark performance. Requires continuous retraining as generative architectures evolve — effectiveness degrades without ongoing maintenance. Static certification is insufficient.

primary_source: Singh et al. (2025); Soundarya et al. (2025)
notes: Best overall performance by combining visual/audio/metadata/linguistic signals. Computationally infeasible for real-time platform moderation without dedicated GPU infrastructure investment.

Best single method for cross-architecture generalization. Spectral features more architecture-agnostic than pixel-level features. Only method rated High across generalization, adversarial robustness, and benchmark accuracy simultaneously. Limited large-scale real-world validation.
